rationale: Educ. Code §29.168 governs school district family engagement plans and contains no reference to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) has no operative interaction with this statute.
quote: A school district shall develop and implement a family engagement plan to assist the district in achieving and maintaining high levels of family involvement and positive family attitudes toward education.
_note: No conflict identified. §29.168 is substantively unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
